current.seo_homepage_title: Homeboy Threads — Donated Designer Clothing | Shop for Good
current.seo_homepage_description: Shop donated clothing from premium brands. Every purchase funds reentry programs and job training through Homeboy Industries in Los Angeles. Free shipping on orders over $75.

settings.message: New donation drop — limited quantities. Free shipping over $75 →
